title: Hyrinity (Legacy)
description: An overall content mod adding progression, bosses, dimensions and more!
body:
# Hyrinity
### v1.1.

## [!] Important [!]

_If you wish to use Hyrinity in a mod pack, if the damage and hp system collides with another mod you can simply disable hyrinity's system by doing_ **/gamerule hyrCompatibilityMode true**
### Note: you may have to clear off resistance from entities if compatibility wasn't already on before.


- The default key to open the menu is [home]
- Highly recommend you use Just Enough Items or a recipe mod alongside this mod if you do not have a modpack.


The mod is an overall content mod, adding multiple things such as:

- Unique and diverse lore.
- Custom and themed dimensions.
- Minibosses and full on boss fights.
- Several biomes within the custom dimensions.
- Custom mechanics, such as a fully decked out damage and health system, weapon and armor classes (Melee, Mage, Ranger) and more!
- Many new items, armor, tools, weapons, blocks and other decorative things.

# Combat
- When you strike a mob, after a second or so you will hear a little click sound indicating you can strike and deal full damage again. This is the cooldown system.
- When wielding a Hyrinity bow, it will not properly fire if you are holding a shield in your off hand.


### Health
- The mod uses a completely customized system as opposed to Minecraft's.
- Your base HP will always be 50 unless modified via gamerule.
- You can upgrade your HP by consuming Nature, Lava and Moon Hearts.

### Mana
- Mana gets consumed when using a magic item or weapon.
- To regenerate mana, you need the **Mana Regeneration Stone** which can be upgraded to make faster regen possible.
- Similarly to Health, Mana has **Crystal Stars**, again allowing for a default of 15 possible consumptions.

### Defense
- This is the mod's version of armor points, the more you have the less damage you will take from most things that care about defense.

### Level
- The leveling system consists of your Player Level, and the skill levels.
Your player's level affects several components of gameplay. Such as Combat, Crafting, Mining and even Exploration.
- Skill levels are always limited to HALF of your max Player Level.
Example: you are player level 10, your max level for skills is 5.
- Player Level is solely leveled up via EXP. Skill levels are a combination of less XP but with their respective Tokens. Example: Melee Token, Ranged Token, ect.

**Melee Level**
- Overall increase to your melee/sword damage output. Will unlock special sword abilities as well.

**Magic Level**
- Levels up your weapons and items, allowing them to be more capable at the cost of less mana.

**Ranged Level**
- Makes ranger items and weapons stronger, making certain accessories aid more in movement and accuracy.

**Mining Level**
- Directly affects your block breaking speed, the higher you level up the faster you will mine.
- Custom dimensions have very strong blocks and exploration in them will be greatly affected by how fast you can mine.
 
**Crafting Level**
- Especially relevant for the **Disk of Enchanting** as well as custom crafting stations that are to come.
- Leveling up your crafting will gain you access to higher power/tier crafting recipes and will allow you to use more altars.

**Movement Level**
- Affects your movement speed and swim speed.
- Changes how effective the boosters are as well as flight time lasting longer the higher you level up.

### Flight
- Flight is simply a number that notifies you on how much you can fly. It does not go down by seconds. Flight can be obtained by crafting items such as **Wings** or any accessory that may allow for flying.


#  Reworked Vanilla Bosses
In Hyrinity, the Warden, Wither and Ender Dragon have all been reworked.

- The Warden has been made into a feasable fight.
- The Wither has been completely overhauled with a few new attacks.
- The Dragon has a huge change, with 5 new attack patterns in store for you.

Reccomendations before going in:
- Make sure you level up your player, as well as your skills.
- Craft the best HP Potions you can
- You do not need max prot gear, although protection is recommended.
- Tier 2 armor is ideal with the Wither and onwards. They can be crafted via the **Obsidian Altar** // **Shadow Bookshelf** // **Earth Smither.**
